svg.title: Tryaksh PCB Design Workflow — One Page
svg.desc: The ten-stage PCB design workflow as a single linear flow with approval markers on each stage that requires sign-off, and two highlighted gates: the schematic lock and the post-breadboard decision.
svg.text: Ten stages, two gates, one direction

g.text: Choose the brains of the board
Prove the risky blocks on real hardware

svg.text: = approval needed before next stage begins
